title: narcissus poeticus var. recurvus
intro: Narcissus poeticus var. recurvus, also known as the Poet's Narcissus or Bell-Fringed Daffodil, is a variety of the Narcissus poeticus plant, characterized by its recurved petals and fragrant blooms. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Narcissus poeticus var. recurvus include its ability to relieve congestion, soothe sore throats, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and bulbs are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it's essential to note that proper identification and preparation are crucial to avoid potential toxicity.
